description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:latest Docker image and caches the node_modules directory with cache key node-current. Define a single job named Node.js Current that runs in the default test stage. In its script, execute the commands: node -v, npm version, set NPM_CONFIG_LOGLEVEL=warn, and run npm it. The job has no additional services, artifacts, or rules, and relies solely on the cache for dependency reuse.
